The test passed. As I suspected, since both survival (cells with 2 or 3 neighbors survive) and reproduction (dead cells with exactly 3 neighbors are born) are already implemented, the block pattern -- where each living cell has exactly 3 neighbors and no dead cell adjacent to the block has 3 living neighbors -- is correctly handled.

